title: S.O. 5845 (E) dated 26.11.2018 - Half-yearly compliance reports in respect of the stipulated prior environmental clearance terms and conditions - EIA Notification, 2006

और उ猴 अिधसूचना म犆, का0आ0 3067(अ), तारीख 1 琈दसंबर, 2009 獧ारा यथा संशोिधत पैरा 10 क琉 उप-पैरा (i(i(i(ii)))) म犆 यह उपबंिधत 琈कया गया है 琈क “प琇रयोजना 灹बंधन के िलए 灹瀄येक कल犆डर वष榁 क琉 1 जून और 1 琈दसंबर को संबंिधत िविनयामक 灹ािधकरण को िनि玑त पूव榁 पया榁वरणीय अनापि牵 के िनबंधन犘 और शत猀 के संबंध म犆 अनुपालन 琇रपोट猀 को अध榁वा琔षक 牲प म犆 हाड榁 और सा瀐ट 灹ितय犘 म犆 灹瀡तुत करना आ榀ापक होगा”; और पया榁वरण, वन और जलवायु प琇रवत榁न मं灴ालय म犆 ब牣त अिधक सं榐या म犆 अध榁वा琔षक मॉनीटरी 琇रपोट榁 जो केवल हाड榁 灹ित म犆 灹ा玅 हो रही ह犉, का पुन琔वलोकन करना और काया榁लय म犆 琇रकॉड榁 रखा जाना अ瀄यंत क琇ठन है और इसके अित琇र猴, उ猴 मं灴ालय क琉 ई-गवन犈स पहल के 牲प म犆 संपूण榁 पया榁वरणीय अनापि牵 灹琈灙या और प玑 अनापि牵 मानीटर करने को ऑनलाइन 琈कया जाना 灹琈灙याधीन है िजसके िलए अध榁वा琔षक मानीटरी 琇रपोट榁 क琉 सा瀐ट 灹ितयां उपयोगी ह犘गी; -- 1 of 4 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] और उपरो猴 को 瀇यान म犆 रखते 牣ए, के瀈灶ीय सरकार उ猴 अिधसूचना का संशोधन, पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) िनयम, 1986 के िनयम 5 के उप-िनयम (3) के खंड (क) म犆 िविन琖द玗 सूचना क琉 अपे楹ा बाबत लोकिहत म犆 ऐसे 玐ि猴य犘 से आ楹ेप और सुझाव आमंि灴त करने, िजनक琉 उससे 灹भािवत होने क琉 संभावना है, से अिभमुि猴 灹दान करना आव瀙यक समझती है; अतः, अब, के瀈灶ीय सरकार पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) िनयम, 1986 के िनयम 5 के उप-िनयम (4) के साथ प琇ठत पया榁वरण (संर楹ण) अिधिनयम, 1986 (1986 का 29) क琉 धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (1) और उपधारा (2) के खंड (v) 獧ारा 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, उ猴 िनयम 5 के उप-िनयम (3) के खंड (क) के अधीन सूचना क琉 अपे楹ा से अिभमुि猴 灹दान करने के प玑ात्, भारत सरकार के त瀄कालीन पया榁वरण और वन मं灴ालय क琉 भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆 सं榐यांक का.आ. 1533(अ), तारीख 14 िसत瀓बर, 2006, का.आ. 3067(अ), तारीख 1 琈दस瀓बर, 2009 獧ारा यथासंशोिधत, 獧ारा 灹कािशत अिधसूचना का िन玈िलिखत और संशोधन करती है, अथा榁त् :- उ猴 अिधसूचना म犆, पैरा 10 म犆, उप-पैरा (ii) म犆 “हाड榁 और सॉ瀐ट 灹ितय犘” श瀑द犘 के 瀡थान पर “सॉ瀐ट 灹ित” श瀑द रखे जाएंगे । [फा. सं. 22-25/2018-आईए-III] िजगमेट टकपा, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : 琇ट瀉पण : मूल अिधसूचना, भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆 का.आ. 1533(अ), तारीख 14 िसत瀓बर, 2006 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और त瀄प玑ात् िन玈िलिखत सं榐यांक犘 獧ारा संशोिधत क琉 गई :- 1. का.आ. 1949(अ), तारीख 13 नव瀓बर, 2006; (अ), तारीख 25th जुलाई , 2018 । MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th November, 2018 S.O. 5845(E).—Whereas, by notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O.1533 (E), dated the 14th September, 2006, issued under sub-section (1) and clause (v) of sub-section (2) of section (3) of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 read with clause (d) of the sub-rule (3) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986 (hereinafter referred to as the said notification), the Central Government directed that on and from the date of its publication, the required construction of new projects or activities or the expansion or modernisation of existing projects or activities listed in the Schedule to the said notification entailing the capacity addition with change in process or technology and or product mix shall be undertaken in any part of India only after prior environmental clearance from the Central Government or as the case may be, by the State Level Environment Impact Assessment Authority, duly constituted by the Central Government under sub-section (3) of section 3 of the said Act, in accordance with the procedure specified therein; And whereas, in the said notification, as amended vide S.O. 3067 (E) dated 1st December 2009, in paragraph 10, in sub-paragraph (ii), it has been provided that “It shall be mandatory for the project management to submit half-yearly compliance reports in respect of the stipulated prior environmental clearance terms and conditions in hard and soft copies to the regulatory authority concerned, on 1st June and 1st December of each calendar year”; And whereas, in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change, large number of half- yearly monitoring reports which are being received only in hard copy, made it difficult to review and record in the office, and moreover, as an e-governance initiative, the said Ministry is in the process of making the entire environment clearance process and post clearance monitoring online for which soft copies of the half-yearly monitoring reports will be useful; And whereas, in view of the above, the Central Government finds it necessary to amend the said notification, by dispensing with the requirement of notice referred to in clause (a) of sub-rule (3) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986 regarding inviting objections and suggestions from persons likely to be affected thereby, in public interest; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) and clause (v)of sub-section (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), read with sub-rule (4) of rule 5 of the Environment (Protection) Rules, 1986, the Central Government, after having dispensed with the requirement of notice under clause (a) of sub-rule (3) of the said rule 5, hereby makes the following further amendments in the said notification of the Government of India, in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii), vide number S.O.1533 (E), dated the 14th September, 2006,namely:- In the said notification, in paragraph 10, in sub-paragraph (ii), for the words “hard and soft copies” the words “soft copy” shall be substituted. [F. No. 22-25/2018-IA.III] JIGMET TAKPA, Jt.
